title: 楽しいお茶会にしよう

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, what a coincidence to encounter familiar
faces here. Have you come to offer up your
prayers?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, good day to you too. We came on
volunteer duty to clean the grounds.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Cleaning was exceptionally fun! You should have
offered to clean too, Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That's right. By the way, what brings you here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The specialty tea shop I go to is close by. I was on
my way back from purchasing some things.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I would love to treat you all to a cup, but I've yet
to mix anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you preparing your own brew? That's
wonderful... I would certainly love to have some.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, are three willing test subjects actually
knocking at my door? Excellent, I would gladly
treat you all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh... I actually already have a mixture
prepared back at the academy. I can begin
brewing it the moment we return.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I haven't had a tea party in so long! I look
forward to receiving your invitation.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there's no need for such formalities,
especially if the tea party takes place at the
academy. So long as we exchange contact
information...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Come to think of it... maybe I should print out a list of precautions.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I would also prefer knowing your health
conditions ahead of time. I'll prepare a few
questions.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Our health conditions?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh my... Thank you for being so thoughtful.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm only doing what is necessary, considering what
you might experience after the tea. Does the
mention of potential numbing cause you any
alarm?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Numbing?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any allergies to speak of! And I will
not be needing a taste tester either. I love my tea
like I love my ramen—piping hot! ☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha, fret not! You may lose the ability to
contain your laughter, but that won't be the fault
of any poison per se.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, a tea party of endless laughter... It seems
we're all in for a very wonderful time.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(What's going on? I don't think we're on the same
page anymore!)
